title: draba cana subsp. cana
intro: Draba cana subsp. cana, also known as the white mountain draba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial plant that grows in mountainous regions, characterized by its white flowers and narrow leaves. The medicinal properties of Draba cana subsp. cana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves for topical application.
